'''Asrat''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where the [[Holy Children of Asrat]] were worshiped. The Children opposed the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] and were targeted for assassination by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. [[Dengar/Legends|Dengar]] left service as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] rather than kill the Children.

{{Planet-stub}}
